creator: k5@respo.or.jp
text:
This port properly depends on ld-linux.so.2.

How-To-Repeat: 
$ ldd /usr/local/bin/rar
/usr/local/bin/rar:
        libc.so.6 => /lib/libc.so.6 (0x28071000)
        /lib/ld-linux.so.2 => /lib/ld-linux.so.2 (0x28064000)
$ su
Password:
# chmod -x /compat/linux/lib/ld-linux.so.2 
# exit
$ rar
ELF interpreter /compat/linux/lib/ld-linux.so.2 not found
Abort trap
